Join the Community
💧 a community for women

gals who sweat

gals who sweat is a community for girls who want to move their bodies, feel stronger, and cheer each other on along the way. whether you’re training for a goal, getting back into a routine, or simply trying to feel your best, this is your space to stay motivated with other like-minded girls.

why gals who sweat?

your community for fitness, wellness and events

gals who sweat is a community for girls who want to move their bodies, feel stronger, and cheer each other on along the way. whether you’re training for a goal, getting back into a routine, or simply trying to feel your best, this is your space to stay motivated with other like-minded girls.

join our community and expect workout inspiration, challenges, incredible foodie recipes, a supportive group of gals, plus our Portugal retreats designed for fitness, wellness, connection, and a little sunshine too ☀️

Join on Facebook Get the newsletter →
100+
gals only trips a year
2019
founded by Brontë King
6+
communities to join
∞
friendships for life
real moments

gals who show up for each other

gals who hike
our newest community combining fitness & travel! join one of our gals who hike trips across the world and explore the outdoors and nature together with a group of like minded gals!! expect breathtaking views, bucket list adventures and hiking to stunning, untouched destinations.
london fitness events
looking for girls to work out with? join one of our london gals who sweat events!! from pilates classes and spin sessions to wellness mornings and post-workout coffees, our london events are all about making fitness more fun. no matter your experience or fitness level, everyone is welcome!!!
fitness & wellness retreats
our fitness & wellness retreats in portugal are the ultimate reset for your mind and body!! think morning workouts, pilates, strength sessions, nourishing food, beach walks, sunset dinners, and plenty of time to switch off. whether you're coming solo or with a friend, you'll leave feeling stronger, more confident, and with a whole new group of girls cheering you on long after the retreat ends!!!
